nonconformances.containment: Quarantine synthetic lot and suspend release
nonconformances.corrective_action: Revise fixture datum verification and first-piece inspection
nonconformances.disposition: Use-as-is only if all affected synthetic margins remain nonnegative; otherwise rework
nonconformances.reverification: Repeat CMM position measurement and rerun margin pipeline
nonconformances.structural_assessment: Recompute fastener bypass and edge-distance margins using measured offset

nonconformances.corrective_action: Correct CAM stock parameter and add in-process thickness check
nonconformances.disposition: Rework or scrap if updated margin is negative
nonconformances.reverification: Inspect thickness map and regenerate analysis manifest
nonconformances.structural_assessment: Rerun plate-bending and fastener-prying sensitivity at measured thickness

nonconformances.containment: Stop synthetic release and document defect location
nonconformances.corrective_action: Revise deburr tool path and visual inspection standard
nonconformances.disposition: Blend repair within synthetic repair envelope or scrap
nonconformances.requirement: Synthetic edge defect depth not to exceed 0.20 mm
nonconformances.reverification: Inspect blend radius and rerun crack-growth screening
nonconformances.structural_assessment: Apply conservative local thickness and initial-flaw sensitivity screening
